title: Ultra Crunchy Peruvian Quinoa Roast
description: A resinous, crunchy Peruvian quinoa dish that combines spicy sazon seasoning with a broiled, toasted finish for an indulgent, sattvic-friendly meal.
instructions: Rinse quinoa until water runs clear, then drain.
In a saucepan, combine rinsed quinoa with 4 cups water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
While quinoa cooks, whisk together 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp aji amarillo paste, 2 tsp sazon, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp cumin, diced onion, and minced garlic in a bowl.
Once quinoa is fluffy, fluff with a fork and fold in the spice mixture, ensuring even coating.
Spread the seasoned quinoa onto a parchment-lined baking sheet in an even layer.
Sprinkle 1/4 cup toasted sesame seeds over the top for extra crunch.
Broil the quinoa in the oven on high for 3 minutes, watching carefully until the edges crisp and become golden.
Remove from oven, garnish with chopped cilantro, let rest for 5 minutes, then serve hot.
